figures.caption: Table 2: Cross-play Nash distance in Prisoner’s Dilemma by agent pair and reasoning mode. L = Llama-3, Q = Qwen2.5. Cells with d ≥ 1.9 indicate mutual full cooperation; cells near 0 indicate near-Nash mutual defection. The 8B model breaks the cooperative lock in Direct mode for any partner; two large models without 8B cooperate 100% in Direct.

Figure 4: Zero-ablating the top-5 opponent-tracking heads individually and jointly produces no change in action distribution (∆P (Nash) = 0.000 in every case). Circles indicate Cooperate probabilities; diamonds indicate Defect. The cooperative override cannot be localized to any head or set of heads.
Figure 1: Nash distance over 50 rounds, Llama-3-8B self-play. No game or mode converges to d = 0. Larger models differ substantially; see Table 1.
